Title: MLOps Engineer (Relocation to Bulgaria Required)
Description:
Sofia Stars is a fast-growing global service provider that guides high-growth businesses to success. Our range of tailored solutions includes R&D, Customer Support, Sales, KYC, Risk, and Anti-Fraud services. We make every connection shine with fresh tech and cultural understanding.




We are looking for an experienced MLOps Engineer to take ownership of our cloud environment and deployment pipelines. will be the driving force behind building and maintaining the infrastructure that powers our custom AI workflows.




Duties and Responsibilities:

Architect & Scale AWS Infrastructure: Lead the design and maintenance of our production-grade AWS environment.
Manage Hybrid Orchestration: Own the development and optimization of our internal orchestration layer, bridging the gap between custom code and cloud-native services.
Automate via IaC: Drive efficiency by managing all cloud resources through Terraform, CloudFormation, or CDK.
Deploy AI & Agentic Workflows: Build and maintain the specialized infrastructure required for AI pipelines, including the orchestration of multi-agent systems and tool-calling frameworks.
Own the MLOps Lifecycle: Direct all source control, monitoring, and deployment procedures, taking full accountability for the stability and speed of our release cycles.




Role Requirements:

AWS Expert: Proven track record of architecting and managing production-grade AWS environments.
AI/ML Infrastructure Fluency: Hands-on experience supporting AI/ML workflows, including data pipelines, model deployment, and specialized orchestration.
Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Proficiency in Terraform (strongly preferred) or similar tools to manage complex, version-controlled cloud environments.
Containerization & Orchestration (Plus): Significant experience with Docker and Kubernetes to package and scale distributed AI applications.

Title: Data & AI Science Consultant
Description:
Are you willing to make a step in your career and deliver Analytics or AI products from early discovery stages up to industrialized solutions to re-imagine the future of the industry as part of large transformation projects?

If this is the case, this role will be of interest to you!

Team



Be at the forefront of the industry, you’ll create, own and make it a reality for clients looking to better serve their connected customers and operate always-on enterprises.

Become an integral part of our Data& AI team with the credibility, expertise and insight clients depend on.

Be working with famous brands and household names – no worrying about how to explain what you do to your family again!

Work alongside global teams to collaborate and deliver the best solutions for our clients.

Align with our industry partners to develop your career and the solutions we deliver for our clients.

Develop others by bringing your unique knowledge and skillsets to the wider practice.



Process



Drive and implement real world solutions into production that drive business value to our clients

Solve challenging business problems using advanced machine learning methods such as Deep Learning and quantitative analytics.

Understand business requirements and support the development of business cases.

Run discovery analytics to identify new and innovative opportunities.

Partner with developers and engineers to deploy machine learning algorithms to deliver business value.

Define approaches to embed and scale machine learning models.

Build reusable assets, solutions and develop best practices for current and future business problems.

Consult on complex analyses and advanced machine learning methods.

Communicate and provide guidance to senior client leadership and teams.



Data



Contribute data science expertise to new sales activities.

Shape DS Strategy and the delivery of DS solutions.

Operate across multiple industries and functions.

Develop others by bringing your unique knowledge and skillsets to the wider practice.



Your team

The Data and AI revolution is changing everything. It’s everywhere – transforming how we work and play. Join Accenture and help transform leading organisations and communities around the world. Accenture Data and AI Science is driving these exciting changes and bringing them to life across 40 industries in more than 120 countries. The sheer scale of our capabilities and client engagements and the way we collaborate with the ecosystem, operate and deliver value provides an unparalleled opportunity to grow and advance.

Accenture’s Data and AI practice covers the range of Data and AI skills, from Strategy, Data Science, Data Architecture, AI Engineering and Visual Insights. When combined with Accenture’s broader Strategy and Consulting practice, we are able to bring together the unique ability to drive end to end business change through the application of Data and AI.

You'll learn, grow and advance in an innovative culture that thrives on shared success, diverse ways of thinking and enables boundaryless opportunities that can drive your career in new and exciting ways.

If you’re looking for a challenging career working in a vibrant environment with access to training and a global network of experts, this could be the role for you. As part of our global team, you'll be working with cutting-edge technologies and will have the opportunity to develop a wide range of new skills on the job.

Accenture is a leading global professional services company, providing a broad range of services in strategy and consulting, interactive, technology and operations, with digital capabilities across all of these services. With our thought leadership and culture of innovation, we apply industry expertise, diverse skill sets and next-generation technology to each business challenge.

We believe in inclusion and diversity and supporting the whole person. Our core values comprise of Stewardship, Best People, Client Value Creation, One Global Network, Respect for the Individual and Integrity. Year after year, Accenture is recognized worldwide not just for business performance but for inclusion and diversity too.

“Across the globe, one thing is universally true of the people of Accenture: We care deeply about what we do and the impact we have with our clients and with the communities in which we work and live. It is personal to all of us.” – Julie Sweet, Accenture CEO

Your background



Relevant work experience in data science, machine learning, and business analytics

Practical experience in coding languages eg. Python, R, Scala, etc.; (Python preferred)

Proficiency in database technologies eg. SQL, ETL, No-SQL, DW, and Big Data technologies e.g. pySpark, Hive, etc.

Experienced working with structured and also unstructured data eg. Text, PDFs, jpgs, call recordings, video, etc.

Knowledge of machine learning modelling techniques and how to fine-tune those models eg. XGBoost, Deep Neural Networks, Transformers, Markov chains, etc.

Experience using specialized machine learning libraries e.g. Fastai, Keras, Tensorflow, pytorch, sci-kit learn, huggingface, etc.

Must demonstrate the capacity of reading, understanding and implementing new techniques in the field of machine learning as they emerge.

Experience of using Cloud technologies eg. AWS, GCP or Azure.

Specialised visualisation techniques eg. D3.js, ggplot etc.

Strong verbal/written communication & data presentation skills

Awareness of Large Language Models (LLMs) and a strong enthusiasm for continuous learning and staying updated with the latest advancements in the field

Fluent in English, in Dutch and/or in French



Bonus point If you…



Willingness and ability to learn quickly and apply creative thinking to finding great solutions and drive their implementation

Ability to successfully build relationships with clients and stakeholders

Mastery of problem solving and solutioning

Proven history and background in statistics/mathematics/macroeconomics



Our offer

Accenture is an incredible place to work - and keep learning. By joining us, you’ll become part of a global company with a world-class brand and reputation. Besides the work we do for our clients, we’re really proud of our vibrant, diverse workplace culture: we believe in openness and honesty, fairness and equality, common sense and realism. We want to get to know the real you and help you explore and grow - whatever it is you're great at. So you will always have lots of learning opportunities (formal and informal) to improve your role-specific skills and expertise.

Besides our high-profile, challenging projects and our nurturing work environment, we offer excellent employee benefits, including:



13th month + holiday allowance

20 + 12 holidays

Laptop and smartphone

Hospitalization insurance and extensive group insurance package

Bonus program

Training & learning opportunities

Green mobility program: e-bikes, public transport, bike 2 work allowance

Flex-rewards: decide on your rewards package with our flexible benefits tool

Discount program: get discounts at your favorite (online) shops

Employee shares purchase plan

Eco-cheques

And many more!

Title: BE - Data Scientist
Description:
Overview

Who are we?

CBTW is a global tech solutions company.

We empower businesses with tailored tech and business solutions that drive innovation and sustainable growth.

With over 2 500 experts across 21 countries, we deliver results through flexible engagement models like: whether augmenting teams, managing complex projects, or building long-term operations.

Thanks to our 5 service lines, we specialize in:


AI & Data Platforms,
Cloud & Enterprise Platforms,
Cybersecurity,
Software Engineering,
Strategy, Product & Transformation.


More info on our website: https://cbtw.tech/

What service line will you be part of?

As a Data Scientist, you will join our AI & Data Platforms expertise.

AI & Data Platforms is CBTW's service line dedicated to supporting organizations in leveraging their data and fulfilling their AI ambitions to achieve tangible results. We focus on adoption and measurable impact from day one, combining our comprehensive, end-to-end expertise with our ecosystem of leading partners such as SAS, Snowflake, Microsoft and Databricks.

Our clients rely on us to support with:


Data Platform modernisation, migration and optimisation
AI-driven Business Insights & Customer Analytics
Cutting-edge GenAI products & Agentic AI automation
Unified Data Platform & Cloud Infrastructure
Data & AI Governance
BI & Analytics for business teams


Responsibilities

What is your role?

You will be part of a journey where you will have two impacts: a client impact and an internal impact. For the internal impact, based on your skills and time, you will be joining our internal data community at CBTW, to share knowledge and best practices. For the client impact, tasks can vary depending on the client and the project, but as a Data Engineer, you will mainly:


Mining both structured and unstructured data to identify patterns and provide information through predictive models
Explore and collect data from multiple sources to apply or develop analytical ad statistical methods and machine learning models
Apply statistics and machine learning algorithms to discover patterns in datasets


Qualifications

What are we offering?

EVOLUTION:


A career development expert will follow up on your professional path within the company and support you in shaping and growing your career,
Catalogue with a wide variety of trainings for hard and soft skills, private language classes, unlimited access to an E-learning platform (Udemy, Code Academy... ) and possibility to get certified every year,
Training days credits.


COLLABORATION:


You will join a community of [job title] experts where colleagues support each other on projects, share knowledge through workshops and events to keep learning and evolving, and build international connections, while also enjoying great moments and drinks together,
Participate in internal projects to innovate and develop our solutions portfolio,
Join one of our collectives (Wellness, Agile, RSE, Gaming ...) and share your interests with other positive thinkers,
You’ll also enjoy several unforgettable company parties throughout the year. Events that CBTW has truly mastered the art of organizing.


ON TOP OF THAT:


We offer a competitive salary with a flexible mobility package that allows you to choose options such as having mobility benefits (electric cars, electric bikes, public transportation subscription).


Your next adventure starts at CBTW!

Do you see a match? We would love to see your application coming in! 😉

Title: Senior Data Scientist
Description:
Voor het Agentschap Vlaamse Dienst voor Arbeidsbemiddeling en Beroepsopleiding (VDAB), is Vlaanderen connect op zoek naar een:

Senior Data Scientist

Contract onbepaalde duur

Brussel

///////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////////

Bij VDAB geloven we dat data en artificiële intelligentie de motor zijn van een moderne arbeidsmarkt. VDAB heeft daarom een matuur AI Center of Excellence (“AI CoE”) uitgebouwd, dat een centrale rol speelt in het vormgeven en begeleiden van deze digitale evolutie.

Voor dit AI CoE zoekt VDAB een ervaren Data Scientist, die leiding en coaching geeft aan het team van Data Scientists, en die de fundamenten van het AI Center of Excellence mee bewaakt en uitbouwt.










Waarom voor deze functie kiezen?

VDAB is een voortrekker in het toepassen van artificiële intelligentie binnen de publieke sector en wil deze positie in de komende jaren verder versterken.

Je krijgt de kans om te werken in een vooruitstrevende en innovatieve omgeving die niet alleen technisch uitdagend is, maar je kan ook een directe maatschappelijke meerwaarde creëren. De oplossingen die we samen realiseren, ondersteunen burgers in elke fase van hun loopbaan en dragen tastbaar bij aan een inclusieve, efficiënte en toekomstgerichte arbeidsmarkt.

Kortom, deze rol biedt een unieke combinatie van technologische innovatie, strategische impact en maatschappelijke relevantie.







Jouw verantwoordelijkheden

Je bent succesvol in deze rol wanneer je:

We verwachten van de kandidaat dat hij/zij zelfstandig van begin tot einde een AI model kan opzetten. Dit dus gaande van het samenstellen van de data, data analyse, kiezen van het correcte model, evaluatie van de output en ondersteuning bij het in productie zetten van dit model. Daarnaast verwachten we dat de kandidaat ook in staat is om zijn/haar keuzes uit te leggen aan een publiek met niet-technische achtergrond. Dit zowel op basis van een presentatie als op basis van een rapport.

Daarnaast verwachten we dat je leiding en coaching geeft aan het team van Data Scientists waarbij je :

* een sterke vertrouwensband opbouwt met de AI Data Scientists

* hen ondersteunt als coach maar ook uitdaagt om het beste uit zichzelf te halen in het belang van de organisatiedoelen

* een volledig overzicht hebt van de huidige AI portfolio en de lopende AI projecten, en de kritieke pijnpunten op vlak van stabiliteit en onderhoudbaarheid kent

* duidelijke afspraken maakt over o.a. code reviews, testing (unit/integratie) en documentatievereisten voor alle nieuwe AI-projecten, in het kader van de AI Governance van VDAB

* bijdraagt aan een geïntegreerde en performante samenwerking van Projectleiders, Data Scientists en Data Engineers

* bijdraagt aan de strategie en visie van het AI Center of Excellence

* bijdraagt aan een goede werking en goede relaties met andere teams zowel binnen als buiten I&T







De 3 belangrijkste verantwoordelijkheden :

Je stuurt en coacht een performant team van Data Scientists. Je zorgt daarbij voor een cultuur van continue verbetering, kennisdeling en technologische innovatie.
Je vertaalt business problemen naar ML/AI oplossingen en je ontwikkelt mee AI/ML modellen van experiment tot productie.
Je bewaakt mee de roadmap en de stabiliteit van de AI-applicaties







Wat zijn de belangrijkste taken?

Ontwikkelen van AI/ML/LLM modellen
Coachen en challengen van de meest geschikte oplossingen (bv ML/ LLM) gegeven de uitdaging
Delen van kennis en inzichten van ontwikkelde modellen







Wat zijn je technische vaardigheden ?







Master of gelijkwaardig door ervaring
Diepgaande kennis van statistiek/probabiliteitstheorie
Diepgaande kennis van Machine Learning Algoritmes.
Uitgebreide ervaring met Python en (Py)Spark
Uitgebreide ervaring met GIT of andere code repositories
Uitgebreide ervaring met generatieve AI toepassingen en modellen
Ervaring met NLP is een pluspunt
Ervaring met Deep Learning is een pluspunt
Ervaring met het in productie zetten van ML oplossingen is een pluspunt
Op de hoogte zijn van de laatste evoluties op het vlak van AI




Welke zijn je persoonlijkheid vaardigheden ?

* Teamplayer - gericht op samenwerking zowel met business teams als technische teams

* People management en ervaring met coachend leiderschap

* Resultaatgericht

* Kritische en oplossingsgerichte denker

* Bewezen ervaring met stakeholder management

* Bewezen ervaring in constructief omgaan met conflicterende visies

* Ervaring met innovatie




Waar ga je werken ?

Je werkt 2 dagen in Brussel, op wandelafstand van het station Brussel Noord.




Jouw toekomstig team

Het team waarvoor je verantwoordelijk bent, bestaat momenteel uit 10 teamleden, waar we de rollen van junior, medior en senior Data Scientist terugvinden. Je werkt nauw samen met een Manager AI Engineering en de Portfolio Manager die het AI Portfolio beheert en de Project Managers aanstuurt. En uiteraard met de Manager van het AI Center of Excellence, aan wie je rapporteert.




Wat zijn typische projecten van deze functie/afdeling?




Typische projecten ontstaan vanuit een idee (ter ondersteuning van burger, werkgever of medewerkers van VDAB) afkomstig van binnen in het team of van business. Hierbij ligt de focus altijd op kwaliteits- en/of efficiëntieverhoging. We starten hier rond een experiment om om te kijken welke meerwaarde we kunnen bieden met behulp van data en AI. Indien dit positief verloopt, wordt het model in meer detail uitgewerkt en wordt er een testbaar prototype ontwikkeld. De volgende stap is dan het in productie plaatsen van de applicatie.







Wat jij van ons mag verwachten




Vlaanderen connect biedt een contract van 38 uur voor onbepaalde duur en een competitief salarispakket met:

Een aantrekkelijke bruto verloning
Een bonussysteem op basis van vast te leggen doelstellingen
28 dagen verlof en extra wettelijke feestdagen (11/07, 02/11 en 15/11).
Een mobiliteitsbudget
Maaltijdcheques van 8 euro/dag (eigen bijdrage 1,09 euro/dag)
Een forfaitaire onkostenvergoeding
Een hospitalisatieverzekering (je kan gezinsleden aansluiten)
Een groepsverzekering
Een arbeidsongevallenverzekering
Een opleidingsbudget
Een laptop
Een smartphone met abonnementsformule
Flexibele werkuren
Thuiswerk Middelen en mogelijkheden tot thuiswerk
Tegemoetkoming in de kosten van school vakantieopvang

We verwachten van de kandidaat dat hij/zij zelfstandig van begin tot einde een AI model kan opzetten. Dit dus gaande van het samenstellen van de data, data analyse, kiezen van het correcte model, evaluatie van de output en ondersteuning bij het in productie zetten van dit model. Daarnaast verwachten we dat de kandidaat ook in staat is om zijn/haar keuzes uit te leggen aan een publiek met niet-technische achtergrond. Dit zowel op basis van een presentatie als op basis van een rapport.

Daarnaast verwachten we dat je leiding en coaching geeft aan het team van Data Scientists waarbij je :

* een sterke vertrouwensband opbouwt met de AI Data Scientists

* hen ondersteunt als coach maar ook uitdaagt om het beste uit zichzelf te halen in het belang van de organisatiedoelen

* een volledig overzicht hebt van de huidige AI portfolio en de lopende AI projecten, en de kritieke pijnpunten op vlak van stabiliteit en onderhoudbaarheid kent

* duidelijke afspraken maakt over o.a. code reviews, testing (unit/integratie) en documentatievereisten voor alle nieuwe AI-projecten, in het kader van de AI Governance van VDAB

* bijdraagt aan een geïntegreerde en performante samenwerking van Projectleiders, Data Scientists en Data Engineers

* bijdraagt aan de strategie en visie van het AI Center of Excellence

* bijdraagt aan een goede werking en goede relaties met andere teams zowel binnen als buiten I&T



De 3 belangrijkste verantwoordelijkheden :

  • Je stuurt en coacht een performant team van Data Scientists. Je zorgt daarbij voor een cultuur van continue verbetering, kennisdeling en technologische innovatie.
  • Je vertaalt business problemen naar ML/AI oplossingen en je ontwikkelt mee AI/ML modellen van experiment tot productie.
  • Je bewaakt mee de roadmap en de stabiliteit van de AI-applicaties



Wat zijn de belangrijkste taken?

  • Ontwikkelen van AI/ML/LLM modellen
  • Coachen en challengen van de meest geschikte oplossingen (bv ML/ LLM) gegeven de uitdaging
  • Delen van kennis en inzichten van ontwikkelde modellen



Wat zijn je technische vaardigheden ?



  • Master of gelijkwaardig door ervaring
  • Diepgaande kennis van statistiek/probabiliteitstheorie
  • Diepgaande kennis van Machine Learning Algoritmes.
  • Uitgebreide ervaring met Python en (Py)Spark
  • Uitgebreide ervaring met GIT of andere code repositories
  • Uitgebreide ervaring met generatieve AI toepassingen en modellen
  • Ervaring met NLP is een pluspunt
  • Ervaring met Deep Learning is een pluspunt
  • Ervaring met het in productie zetten van ML oplossingen is een pluspunt
  • Op de hoogte zijn van de laatste evoluties op het vlak van AI


Welke zijn je persoonlijkheid vaardigheden ?

* Teamplayer - gericht op samenwerking zowel met business teams als technische teams

* People management en ervaring met coachend leiderschap

* Resultaatgericht

* Kritische en oplossingsgerichte denker

* Bewezen ervaring met stakeholder management

* Bewezen ervaring in constructief omgaan met conflicterende visies

* Ervaring met innovatie


Waar ga je werken ?

Je werkt 2 dagen in Brussel, op wandelafstand van het station Brussel Noord.


Jouw toekomstig team

Het team waarvoor je verantwoordelijk bent, bestaat momenteel uit 10 teamleden, waar we de rollen van junior, medior en senior Data Scientist terugvinden. Je werkt nauw samen met een Manager AI Engineering en de Portfolio Manager die het AI Portfolio beheert en de Project Managers aanstuurt. En uiteraard met de Manager van het AI Center of Excellence, aan wie je rapporteert.


Wat zijn typische projecten van deze functie/afdeling?


Typische projecten ontstaan vanuit een idee (ter ondersteuning van burger, werkgever of medewerkers van VDAB) afkomstig van binnen in het team of van business. Hierbij ligt de focus altijd op kwaliteits- en/of efficiëntieverhoging. We starten hier rond een experiment om om te kijken welke meerwaarde we kunnen bieden met behulp van data en AI. Indien dit positief verloopt, wordt het model in meer detail uitgewerkt en wordt er een testbaar prototype ontwikkeld. De volgende stap is dan het in productie plaatsen van de applicatie.



Wat jij van ons mag verwachten


Vlaanderen connect biedt een contract van 38 uur voor onbepaalde duur en een competitief salarispakket met:

  • Een aantrekkelijke bruto verloning
  • Een bonussysteem op basis van vast te leggen doelstellingen
  • 28 dagen verlof en extra wettelijke feestdagen (11/07, 02/11 en 15/11).
  • Een mobiliteitsbudget
  • Maaltijdcheques van 8 euro/dag (eigen bijdrage 1,09 euro/dag)
  • Een forfaitaire onkostenvergoeding
  • Een hospitalisatieverzekering (je kan gezinsleden aansluiten)
  • Een groepsverzekering
  • Een arbeidsongevallenverzekering
  • Een opleidingsbudget
  • Een laptop
  • Een smartphone met abonnementsformule
  • Flexibele werkuren
  • Thuiswerk Middelen en mogelijkheden tot thuiswerk
  • Tegemoetkoming in de kosten van school vakantieopvang

Title: Scientist, Operations
Description:
We provide high-quality products and cutting-edge ingredients sourced sustainably and ethically. One of our top priorities is ensuring we are providing consumer quality products that live up to our brand names. We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Product Stability Evaluation Specialist to join our innovative Research & Development team. You will play a crucial role in determining the shelf life of our products by linking analytical data, process optimization, and formulation excellence. This is an excellent opportunity for an individual with a strong background in stability studies, process engineering, and analytical methodologies to contribute to the development of high-quality products.

Key Responsibilities

Stability Study Design and Execution:


Design and Implement product stability studies to assess physical, chemical, and microbiological stability over time.
Executing protocols for accelerated and real-time stability testing to predict product shelf life.


Process And Formulation Optimization


Collaborate with formulation scientists and process engineers to optimize product formulations and manufacturing processes for extended stability.
Identify critical process parameters impacting product stability and recommend improvements.


Regulatory Compliance


Ensure all stability testing and documentation meet industry standards and regulatory requirements.


Cross-functional Collaboration


Work closely with R&D, Quality Assurance, Manufacturing, and Supply Chain teams to ensure successful product development and commercialization.
Provide technical support and guidance to resolve stability-related issues throughout the product lifecycle.


Continuous Improvement


Stay current with industry trends, emerging technologies, and regulatory guidelines affecting product stability evaluation.
Implement continuous improvement initiatives to enhance stability study efficiency and effectiveness.


Data Analysis And Interpretation


Utilize advanced analytical techniques to assess degradation products, potency, and efficacy of formulations.
Analyze and interpret stability data to make data-driven recommendations on product shelf life.
Prepare and review technical reports and regulatory submissions related to product stability.


What We'll Do For You


Dynamic Team Environment: Be part of a diverse and enthusiastic team where your efforts are genuinely appreciated.
International Exposure: Gain insights and professional growth in an international shared-services environment, dealing with diverse client groups.
Innovative Experience: The Opportunity to take part in the development of global processes and contribute to meaningful projects.
Continuous Growth: Commitment to your professional development in a company that values growth, diversity, and innovation.


Collaboration, Continuous Improvement, Cross-Functional Teamwork, Data Driven, Design, Formulation Optimization, Gas Chromatography (GC), High-Performance Liquid Chromatography (HPLC), Product Development, Product Formulation, Product Lifecycle, Product Stability, Regulatory Compliance, Regulatory Requirements, Research Development, Stability Studies, Stability Testing, Ultra Performance Liquid Chromatography (UPLC)

Location(s):

Belgium

City/Cities

Brussels

Travel Required

00% - 25%

Relocation Provided:

No

Job Posting End Date

June 9, 2026

Our Purpose And Growth Culture

We are taking deliberate action to nurture an inclusive culture that is grounded in our company purpose, to refresh the world and make a difference. We act with a growth mindset, take an expansive approach to what’s possible and believe in continuous learning to improve our business and ourselves. We focus on four key behaviors – curious, empowered, inclusive and agile – and value how we work as much as what we achieve. We believe that our culture is one of the reasons our company continues to thrive after 130+ years. Visit Our Purpose and Vision to learn more about these behaviors and how you can bring them to life in your next role at Coca-Cola.

Title: Machine Learning Engineer
Description:
ML OPS Engineer / AI Engineer

About NORRIQ

NORRIQ is an international group based in Denmark and Belgium, comprising over 350 consultants dedicated to unlocking the full business potential of companies through technology and digital transformation.

We have a specialized Financial Services practice that is experiencing rapid growth. Over 100 consultants focus exclusively on the financial services sector, assisting banks and insurances in redesigning their operations to meet changing client expectations, adopt new technologies, and adhere to evolving regulations (DORA, RIS, AI Act, AML, KYC, etc).

At NORRIQ, our employees are at the heart of our organization and our success.. We hire and nurture passionate individuals who strive for excellence for both our clients and colleagues. Our culture supports personal and professional growth with training, opportunities, and creative freedom. Regardless of when you join or how long you stay, you'll experience an unforgettable NORRIQ journey and become a part of our extended family. Connected forever!

Role Overview

As an MLOps Engineer / AI Engineer, you will play a central role in bridging Data Science and IT Operations. You will design, deploy, and scale production-grade machine learning and AI solutions for our financial services clients. Your mission is to ensure robust, secure, and efficient AI operations—covering deployment, observability, lifecycle management, and continuous improvement.

This role is ideal for someone who loves building AI infrastructure, optimizing performance, and enabling data scientists to move faster and safer.

Key Responsibilities


Deploy ML/AI Models: Work with Data Scientists to deploy secure, scalable, and reliable models into production.
Build CI/CD Pipelines: Automate testing, packaging, and deployment for data and model workflows.
Manage Data Pipelines: Design and maintain efficient data flows across storage systems, databases, and platforms.
Set Up Environments: Manage dependencies, development environments, and tooling for smooth project onboarding.
Operate Kubernetes: Deploy and maintain containerized AI components using Kubernetes.
Monitor & Troubleshoot: Oversee model/application performance, resolve incidents, and conduct root-cause analyses.
Optimize & Innovate: Identify improvements, adopt new technologies, and enhance AI engineering practices.


Requirements

Education


Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.
Strong background in programming, system engineering, or DevOps is highly valued.


Technical Skills


Strong proficiency in Python.
Experience with REST APIs and Git.
Hands-on expertise in CI/CD and MLOps/DevOps practices.
Practical experience with Docker and Kubernetes.
Familiarity with Linux, software testing, and modern software engineering workflows.
Nice to have: SQL/PostgreSQL, MLflow, Helm, or related tooling.


Soft Skills


Collaborative and team-oriented mindset.
Proactive, solution-driven, and comfortable working in dynamic environments.
Strong communication, analytical, and problem-solving abilities.


Languages


Fluent in English (spoken and written).
Knowledge of additional languages (Dutch or French) is a plus.


Why Joining Us?


You will be part of a fast growing international company with a unique people culture
A very competitive salary package including a company car, iPhone and different allowances
You will get extensive trainings in Belgium and Denmark on technical matters, as well as soft skills and project management, and you will have access to new technologies and innovative equipment.
You will join a dynamic and growing team with a great mix of young and experienced professionals focusing on financial services.

Title: (fluent Polish) Technical Support Consultant, remote (Future Openings)
HTML:
Who we are?

SupportYourApp is a global Intelligent Support-as-a-Service leader, collaborating with top-tier tech companies like Mastercard, Calm, and MacPaw since 2010. We operate in 30+ countries and from 90+ countries, and support customers in 60 languages, helping SaaS, software, and hardware brands deliver secure, world-class customer and technical support.

Right now, we're expanding our talent bench — a pool of skilled Customer Support Consultants who want to grow with us and be the first in line when new projects open.

If you're ready to join a multicultural, multilingual community and grow professionally while working from home, this could be your next step.

What you will do:

  • Provide exceptional technical support via calls, chats, and emails;
  • Resolve support inquiries of various difficulties, including "how-to" guidance and product assistance;
  • Gather required technical information to ensure the resolution of complex cases;
  • Ensure customers' satisfaction with any interaction;
  • Maintain working knowledge of our client's products and services;
  • Securely work with customers' sensitive information;
  • Troubleshoot common issues using the knowledge base and update transaction statuses when needed;
  • Escalate complex, repetitive, or merchant-related issues to L2 team;
  • Ensure proper case handling and follow-up to support timely issue resolution

What you need to succeed in this role:

  • Excellent English and Polish communication skills (at least C1 for both spoken and written);
  • Minimum of 1 year of experience in Customer Support;
  • Must be tech-savvy with the ability to quickly learn and navigate new systems, tools, and platforms;
  • Customer-oriented and responsible attitude

Will be a great plus:

  • Experience with Technical Support

Benefits:

  • Schedule: 5 working days, Monday to Friday, from 9am - 5pm CET;
  • Opportunity to cooperate fully remotely;
  • Inclusive international environment;
  • Compensation in USD;
  • Rewards for referring friends;
  • Balance between project workload and personal time, but also - internal health policy;
  • Responsive leadership interested in your development and long-lasting cooperation;
  • Greenhouse conditions for self-development;
  • A culture built on trust, with no time-tracking requirements;
  • Personal computer (at least 8Gb of RAM) with a stable internet connection (minimum 50 Mbps-download and 40 Mbps-upload)
  • The items listed in this section may vary depending on the terms of your engagement. Certain benefits and conditions typically apply to employees; independent contractors may not be eligible for all of these. The specific terms, including compensation, benefits, and work conditions, will be clearly defined in your agreement if selected

You can learn more about the company and its culture by visiting our official website and social pages on Facebook, Instagram, and LinkedIn.

So if you're a proactive Support Specialist who thrives on solving problems, ensuring customer satisfaction, and delivering outstanding service, don't miss this opportunity and send us your CV in English to collaborate with us!

Over 1300+ specialists who already deliver exceptional customer experiences collaborating with SupportYourApp.

Know someone perfect for the role? Refer them and get rewarded!

We adhere to the principles of equal treatment of candidates and prohibit discrimination on any grounds protected by law.

Your personal data will be processed as described in the SupportYourApp Candidate Privacy Notice.

Title: Data Scientist H/F
Description:
MCA BELGIUM, filiale du groupe français MCA, est une société de conseil en ingénierie et hautes technologies. Avec plus de 15 ans d’expérience en Belgique, nous accompagnons nos clients dans la réalisation de projets industriels complexes dans divers secteurs d’activité (énergie, nucléaire, pharmaceutique, aéronautique, ferroviaire).

Nous rejoindre, c’est intégrer une entreprise dynamique qui place l’accompagnement de ses collaborateurs au cœur de ses priorités. Vous bénéficierez d’un suivi personnalisé et de nombreuses formations pour développer vos compétences.

Votre Rôle

Rattaché(e) au pôle Data & Engineering, vous intervenez sur l’exploitation avancée de données industrielles issues d’équipements d’énergies renouvelables (solaire & éolien), avec pour objectif d’optimiser la performance des installations et d’anticiper les défaillances :


Analyse de données provenant de machines industrielles (production, capteurs, historiques de fonctionnement)
Conception et développement de modèles statistiques et algorithmiques (machine learning, détection d’anomalies)
Identification des pertes de performance, anomalies et risques de panne
Participation à la mise en place de solutions de maintenance prédictive
Contribution à l’optimisation du potentiel des équipements
Restitution des résultats via rapports techniques et documentation associée
Collaboration avec les équipes multidisciplinaires (ingénierie, experts terrain, métiers)
Veille sur les évolutions technologiques et méthodologiques en data science appliquée à l’industrie


Votre Profil


Diplôme d’ingénieur ou formation équivalente, idéalement avec une spécialisation en data science, mathématiques appliquées ou domaine proche
Première expérience professionnelle en data (stage long, VIE ou premier poste accepté), avec exposition concrète à des projets data
Maîtrise de Python
Bonne compréhension des algorithmes, statistiques et approches machine learning
Esprit analytique, rigueur et sens du travail en équipe
Maîtrise du français & anglais professionnel


Vos Perspectives D’évolution

Nous souhaitons vous accompagner dans votre montée en compétences. Notre objectif est de vous donner toutes les clés pour réussir et accéder aux différentes opportunités d’évolution. Vous pourrez évoluer vers des fonctions techniques, de gestion de projet ou de management. Ce poste est ouvert aux personnes en situation de handicap.

Title: AI engineer
Description:
WHAT CREAM IS ALL ABOUT?

We could be a Cream Factory, a cooking blog or even a detective agency…but in reality, we are a consulting company in Business & Technology active in large organizations and industry leaders in Banking, Insurance, Telecom, Energy, Retail & Transport.




CREAM’S SPECIAL RECIPE:

- 1/3 of Personal development

- 1/3 of Collective Intelligence

- 1/3 of Intrapreneurship

And Bonus ingredient: … Some passionate colleagues :)




WHAT IS AN AI ENGINEER AT CREAM?

As an AI Engineer, you will have a central role in designing, building and deploying advanced AI solutions. Your tasks will be :

Develop end-to-end AI use cases, from business understanding to solution deployment.
Quickly prototype AI-driven scenarios and user-facing features.
Engineer effective prompts to optimize AI agent behavior and performance.
Collaborate closely with design, product and development teams
Design, develop and implement AI solutions using Azure OpenAI and other Azure services to translate business needs into technical AI solutions.
Integrate Azure AI services seamlessly into existing systems and enterprise environments.
Leverage your creativity and expertise to design intelligent solutions that combine data, AI and business requirements.
Document clearly all code, processes, architectures and workflows to ensure maintainability.
Participate actively in code reviews, knowledge-sharing and continuous improvement initiatives.
Apply best practices in software development, security, compliance, scalability, and performance optimization such as Devops CI/CD for AI projects.
Stay up to date with AI and machine learning trends, experiment with emerging techniques, and incorporate relevant advancements into your projects.
Contribute to use case definition in a co-creation mode with business and product stakeholders.




WHAT DO WE EXPECT FROM OUR CONSULTANT ?

You hold a Master's degree.
You have minimum 3 years of professional experience in Data Engineering, AI or related disciplines.
You have strong hands-on experience with Agentic AI frameworks (OpenAI Agent SDK, MCP Tools, etc.).
You have preferably strong knowledge of Devops practices and CI/CD OR eagerness to learn.
You are proficient in Azure AI services and their integration into real-world business solutions.
You have a solid programming background (Python, Azure ML Services, API integration, etc.).
You are fluent in English AND in French or Dutch; passive understanding of the other language is a strong asset.
You have excellent analytical, communication and problem-solving skills.
You enjoy working in a collaborative, fast-moving environment where innovation and pragmatism meet.




WHY SHOULD YOU TASTE THE LIME FLAVOUR?

A strong learning environment: tribes, training budget
Career follow-up with dedicated Business Managers and an associate plan
Attractive benefits package (mobility plan, meal vouchers, insurances,...)
Hybrid working model: client working, home working & Cream working
Strong CSR commitments, with recognized labels in environmental responsibility and diversity & inclusion.
A consulting company of around 200 Creamers, located in the center of Brussels




Our recruitment process is clear and structured, with three steps and feedback throughout.

Cream Consulting is committed to equal opportunities. If you need any specific accommodation to fully participate in the recruitment process or the interview, please let us know.

Think this role is a match? Apply and let’s talk, or explore our other opportunities at Cream.

WHAT IS AN AI ENGINEER AT CREAM?

As an AI Engineer, you will have a central role in designing, building and deploying advanced AI solutions. Your tasks will be :

  • Develop end-to-end AI use cases, from business understanding to solution deployment.
  • Quickly prototype AI-driven scenarios and user-facing features.
  • Engineer effective prompts to optimize AI agent behavior and performance.
  • Collaborate closely with design, product and development teams
  • Design, develop and implement AI solutions using Azure OpenAI and other Azure services to translate business needs into technical AI solutions.
  • Integrate Azure AI services seamlessly into existing systems and enterprise environments.
  • Leverage your creativity and expertise to design intelligent solutions that combine data, AI and business requirements.
  • Document clearly all code, processes, architectures and workflows to ensure maintainability.
  • Participate actively in code reviews, knowledge-sharing and continuous improvement initiatives.
  • Apply best practices in software development, security, compliance, scalability, and performance optimization such as Devops CI/CD for AI projects.
  • Stay up to date with AI and machine learning trends, experiment with emerging techniques, and incorporate relevant advancements into your projects.
  • Contribute to use case definition in a co-creation mode with business and product stakeholders.


WHAT DO WE EXPECT FROM OUR CONSULTANT ?

  • You hold a Master's degree.
  • You have minimum 3 years of professional experience in Data Engineering, AI or related disciplines.
  • You have strong hands-on experience with Agentic AI frameworks (OpenAI Agent SDK, MCP Tools, etc.).
  • You have preferably strong knowledge of Devops practices and CI/CD OR eagerness to learn.
  • You are proficient in Azure AI services and their integration into real-world business solutions.
  • You have a solid programming background (Python, Azure ML Services, API integration, etc.).
  • You are fluent in English AND in French or Dutch; passive understanding of the other language is a strong asset.
  • You have excellent analytical, communication and problem-solving skills.
  • You enjoy working in a collaborative, fast-moving environment where innovation and pragmatism meet.


WHY SHOULD YOU TASTE THE LIME FLAVOUR?

  • A strong learning environment: tribes, training budget
  • Career follow-up with dedicated Business Managers and an associate plan
  • Attractive benefits package (mobility plan, meal vouchers, insurances,...)
  • Hybrid working model: client working, home working & Cream working
  • Strong CSR commitments, with recognized labels in environmental responsibility and diversity & inclusion.
  • A consulting company of around 200 Creamers, located in the center of Brussels


Our recruitment process is clear and structured, with three steps and feedback throughout.

Cream Consulting is committed to equal opportunities. If you need any specific accommodation to fully participate in the recruitment process or the interview, please let us know.

  • Think this role is a match? Apply and let’s talk, or explore our other opportunities at Cream.

Title: AI Engineer (CDI, freelance)
Description:
Amarris Tech (groupe Amarris, +700 collaborateurs en France et Belgique) entre dans une nouvelle phase de son histoire : l'intégration de l'IA au cœur de sa plateforme technologique propriétaire.

Nous recherchons un(e) AI Engineer passionné(e) par la construction d'agents IA, prêt(e) à concevoir et déployer des systèmes intelligents qui transforment concrètement la façon dont nos clients et collaborateurs travaillent au quotidien.

🎯 Ce que tu feras

En Tant Qu'AI Engineer, Tes Missions Incluront Notamment


Concevoir et développer des agents IA capables d'exécuter des tâches complexes de façon autonome, en s'appuyant sur nos données métier.
Intégrer et orchestrer des LLMs (GPT, Claude, Mistral, etc.) dans des pipelines robustes, indépendants d'un modèle spécifique.
Construire et maintenir des APIs pour connecter nos agents à notre écosystème de données et de logiciels comptables.
Concevoir des architectures RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) exploitant nos bases de données métier : factures, écritures comptables, données financières.
Mettre en place des mécanismes d'évaluation et de garde-fous pour garantir la fiabilité des agents en production.
Collaborer étroitement avec les comptables seniors et chefs de projet pour traduire les besoins métier en solutions IA concrètes.
Contribuer à la construction de l'OS IA d'Amarris : infrastructure souveraine, scalable et indépendante des fournisseurs LLM.


📌 Profil recherché

Nous Recherchons Un(e) Candidat(e) Qui


A au moins 1 ans d'expérience en IA générative ou en développement d'agents et a moins 4 ans d'expérience en développement.
Maîtrise ou une connaissance des frameworks d'orchestration d'agents (LangChain, LangGraph, AutoGen, CrewAI ou équivalents).
Est à l'aise avec les concepts de RAG, de vector stores (Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector…) et de gestion de prompts.
Comprend les enjeux de souveraineté des données et sait concevoir des architectures respectueuses de la confidentialité.
Est curieux(se), autonome, et aime apprendre vite dans un domaine qui évolue à toute vitesse.


💼 Ce que nous offrons


Un contrat CDI (ou un statut freelance) au sein d'une équipe tech en forte croissance (35+ ingénieurs), à Bruxelles.
Une infrastructure propriétaire riche en données métier sur laquelle construire des agents vraiment utiles — pas de PoC sans lendemain.
Un rôle fondateur au sein d'une équipe IA en cours de constitution, avec une vraie influence sur les choix d'architecture.
Une politique de travail hybride flexible (télétravail + présence en bureau).


📈 Pourquoi ce rôle est stratégique

Ce poste est idéal pour une personne qui :


Veut construire des agents IA en production réelle, pas juste expérimenter dans des notebooks.
Veut travailler sur de la donnée métier dense et structurée, là où l'IA crée une valeur ajoutée immédiate et mesurable.
Cherche à poser les bases d'une infrastructure IA qui sera déployée à l'échelle d'une entreprise de +700 personnes.

Title: Social Media Officer
Description:
Primary Location

Belgium-Brussels

NATO Body

NATO International Staff (NATO IS)

Schedule

Full-time

Application Deadline

14-Jun-2026, 11:59:00 PM

Salary (Pay Basis)

5,234.63

Grade

NATO Grade G11-G15


SUMMARY



The Office of Strategic Communications (OSC) provides communications direction and guidance to stakeholders across the NATO enterprise and coordinates strategic communications activities across all NATO civilian and military bodies. The Office carries out full-spectrum communications, analysing the information environment, designing and creating content, managing communications technology and platforms, overseeing media relations, and engaging audiences through a wide range of channels.

The Social Media Officer advocates for a digital-first communications culture and is the enemy of boring content, helping to drive reach, engagement and growth in @NATO social media channels. The incumbent keeps pace with digital trends and ensures communication helps to deliver the Alliance’s strategic communication objectives and political priorities.


QUALIFICATIONS AND EXPERIENCE



The incumbent must:


possess a university degree in communications, international affairs or a related discipline;
have a minimum of 3 years of experience and expertise in managing multiple social media channels, platforms (e.g. Facebook, X, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, Tik Tok), monitoring and assessment tools;
demonstrate keen political awareness, have knowledge of current events and proven ability to communicate creatively, signal relevance and engage varied audiences;
have expertise in navigating an evolving digital landscape and a strong understanding of the changing technical elements of social media platforms and how to harness each of them;
possess the following minimum levels of NATO’s official languages (English/French): V (“Advanced”) in one; I (“Beginner”) in the other.



The following would be considered an advantage:


knowledge of NATO’s organisational structure and affiliated organisations;
experience in campaigns and localisation for segmented international audiences;
experience creating such microcontent as basic picture and video research and editing, copywriting and simple graphic design.
MAIN ACCOUNTABILITIES



Planning and Execution. Manage select @NATO social media channels and provide back-up and support to colleagues who lead on other channels. Under the direction of the Head, Social Media and in coordination with the Social Media Manager; conceive, post and monitor all daily content on select @NATO flagship social media channels and autonomously undertake community management. Identify and implement strategic use of paid advertising in support of priorities.

Project Management. Shape the ideas, planning, tactics and strategy on these channels for key activities such as ministerials and summits, campaigns and priority communication efforts. Undertake project lead and point of contact roles for specific communication activities such as campaigns or large-scale events, including responsibility for the strategic approach, implementation, and the managing of external contractors, agencies or engagement with partners and stakeholders.

Knowledge Management. Undertake assessment, community management and social listening for select @NATO social media channels, identifying trends and opportunities to contribute to a feedback loop that helps to instill a data and audience-led approach to our content creation. Support assessment to continue to improve the way the OSC delivers NATO’s communication goals. Coordinate own efforts within the Section and across the Organization to ensure that appropriate knowledge management systems and mechanisms are in place.

Expertise Development. Continuously monitor, analyse and maintain understanding of the changing social media landscape in order to adapt and iterate NATO’s communications. Pro-actively test, iterate and advise the Head, Social Media on the use of new tactics and tools and propose improvements to existing approaches and updates to strategy. Provide consultancy and technical expertise, including delivering presentations, training and seminars to uplift Alliance capabilities.

Perform any other related duty as assigned.


INTERRELATIONSHIPS



Reporting Line: The incumbent reports to the Head, Social Media.

Interactions: The incumbent is also required to maintain close working relationships with other teams in OSC as well as with other internal and external contacts in the field of digital outreach, including NATO Commands.

Direct reports: N/a

Indirect reports: N/a.


COMPETENCIES



The incumbent must demonstrate:


Achievement: Works to meet standards;
Analytical Thinking: Sees multiple relationships;
Conceptual Thinking: Sees patterns based on life/work experience;
Clarity and Accuracy: Checks own work;
Customer Service Orientation: Takes personal responsibility for correcting problems;
Empathy: Reads non-verbal cues and understands meanings
Flexibility: Acts with flexibility;
Impact and Influence: Takes multiple actions to persuade;
Initiative: Is decisive in a time-sensitive situation;
Teamwork: Solicits inputs and encourages others.
CONTRACT



Contract to be offered to the successful applicant (if non-seconded): Definite duration contract of three years; possibility of renewal for up to three years, during which the incumbent may apply for conversion to an indefinite duration contract.

Contract clause applicable:

In accordance with the contract policy, this is a post in which turnover is desirable for political reasons in order to be able to accommodate the Organisation's need to carry out its tasks as mandated by the Nations in a changing environment, for example by maintaining the flexibility necessary to shape the Organisation's skills profile, and to ensure appropriate international diversity.

The maximum period of service foreseen in this post is 6 years. The successful applicant will be offered a 3-year definite duration contract, which may be renewed for a further period of up to 3 years. However, according to the procedure described in the contract policy the incumbent may apply for conversion to an indefinite contract during the period of renewal and no later than one year before the end of contract.

If the successful applicant is seconded from the national administration of one of NATO’s member States, a 3-year definite duration contract will be offered, which may be renewed for a further period of up to 3 years subject also to the agreement of the national authority concerned. The maximum period of service in the post as a seconded staff member is six years.

Serving staff will be offered a contract in accordance with the NATO Civilian Personnel Régulations.

NOTE: Irrespective of previous qualifications and experience, candidates for twin-graded posts will be appointed at the lower grade. Advancement to the higher grade is not automatic, and will not normally take place during the first three years of service in the post.

Under specific circumstances, serving staff members may be appointed directly to the higher grade, and a period of three years might be reduced by up to twenty four months for external candidates. These circumstances are described in the IS directive on twin-graded posts.


USEFUL INFORMATION REGARDING APPLICATION AND RECRUITMENT PROCESS



Please note that we can only accept applications from nationals of NATO member countries. Applications must be submitted using e-recruitment system, as applicable:


For NATO civilian staff members only: please apply via the internal recruitment portal ( link );
For all other applications: www.nato.int/recruitment



Before you apply to any position, we encourage you to click here and watch our video providing 6 tips to prepare you for your application and recruitment process.

Do you have questions on the application process in the system and not sure how to proceed? Click here for a video containing the information you need to successfully submit your application on time.

When submitting your application, please ensure that your Taleo Candidate Profile is updated and that your CV is correctly uploaded in the Taleo attachments section.

More information about the recruitment process and conditions of employment, can be found at our website (http://www.nato.int/cps/en/natolive/recruit-hq-e.htm)

Appointment will be subject to receipt of a security clearance (provided by the national Authorities of the selected candidate), approval of the candidate’s medical file by the NATO Medical Adviser, verification of your study(ies) and work experience, and the successful completion of the accreditation and notification process by the relevant authorities.

NATO will not accept any phase of the recruitment and selection prepared, in whole or in part, by means of reference documents without proper quotes (plagiarism), or any tools available on internet, including but not limited to translation facilities, or generative artificial-intelligence (AI) tools. NATO reserves the right to screen applications to identify the use of such tools. All applications prepared, in whole or in part, by means of such tools will be rejected without further consideration, and NATO reserves the right to take further steps in such cases as appropriate.


ADDITIONAL INFORMATION



NATO is committed to diversity and inclusion, and strives to provide equal access to employment, advancement and retention, independent of gender, age, nationality, ethnic origin, religion or belief, cultural background, sexual orientation, and disability. NATO welcomes applications of nationals from all member Nations, and strongly encourages women to apply.

NATO is committed to fostering an inclusive and accessible working environment, where all candidates living with disabilities can fully participate in the recruitment and selection process. If you require reasonable accommodation, please inform us during your selection process.

Candidates will be required to provide documented medical evidence to support their request for accommodation.

Building Integrity is a key element of NATO’s core tasks. As an employer, NATO values commitment to the principles of integrity, transparency and accountability in accordance with international norms and practices established for the defence and related security sector. Selected candidates are expected to be role models of integrity, and to promote good governance through ongoing efforts in their work.

Due to the broad interest in NATO and the large number of potential candidates, telephone or e-mail enquiries cannot be dealt with.

Applicants who are not successful in this competition may be offered an appointment to another post of a similar nature, albeit at the same or a lower grade, provided they meet the necessary requirements.

The nature of this position may require the staff member at times to be called upon to travel for work and/or to work outside normal office hours.

The organization offers several work-life policies including Teleworking and Flexible Working arrangements (Flexitime) subject to business requirements.

Please note that the International Staff at NATO Headquarters in Brussels, Belgium is a non-smoking environment.

For information about the NATO Single Salary Scale (Grading, Allowances, etc.) please visit our website . Detailed data is available under the Salary and Benefits tab.

NATO does not charge any application, processing, training, interviewing, testing or other fee in connection with the application or recruitment process. For more info please click here .

Title: AI Engineer
Description:
Company Description

Sopra Steria offers tailored, end-to-end corporate technology and software solutions to help clients make bold choices and deliver results. Successfully so! With more than 51.000 colleagues in nearly 30 countries, we rank as Europe’s leading digital solutions provider. Some of the most successful companies in Europe rely on our technology due to our commitment to innovation, collaboration, and value in business development.

The world is how we shape it. Let’s shape it together.

Job Description

Join our Data & AI team.

You will become part of a multidisciplinary team where data engineering, architecture, AI, analytics, governance and visualization come together. Together, we help clients get more value out of their data: from setting up the right data foundations to building dashboards, analytics solutions and AI use cases that support better decisions.

As an AI Engineer, you will contribute to this by designing, building and industrializing AI solutions that solve concrete business problems and can be used in real operational environments.

You bring traditional AI and generative AI into real-world use cases by helping our clients design, build and deploy AI solutions. You work on solutions ranging from machine learning models and NLP to LLMs, semantic search, RAG solutions and conversational AI.

You train, fine-tune, improve and deploy ML and AI models. You write production-ready Python code to serve online, batch and real-time models, and you build applications and software components that make AI-driven use cases usable in practice.

You work in close collaboration with Data Scientists, MLOps Engineers, Data Engineers, AI Architects and other specialists to integrate all parts of the solution. Depending on the project, you may help build new AI solutions from the ground up or support clients in operating and improving existing solutions over a medium to long-term basis.

Within our Data & AI team, we help each other grow and keep learning from one another. Are you looking for a role where you can combine AI engineering, software development, MLOps and applied innovation? Then the Data & AI team at Sopra Steria is the right place for you.

Qualifications

We’re looking for an AI Engineer who combines strong AI knowledge with solid software engineering skills. You are able to move beyond experimentation and help turn AI use cases into reliable, maintainable and production-ready solutions.

You’ll have knowledge and experience of the following:


At least 3 years of experience as a Machine Learning Engineer, Data Scientist, MLOps Engineer, or in a similar position
Experience with traditional NLP, LLMs, and conversational AI, both in experimentation phase and in production
Experience with vector databases for semantic search and RAG solutions in a production environment.
Strong software engineering background and ability to write production ready code in Python
Experience with experiment tracking, models monitoring, LLM and NLP evaluation techniques, and deployment strategies
Comfortable with the machine learning lifecycle and MLOps and DevOps principles
Experience with at least one cloud provider and good knowledge of the data ecosystem
Able to coach others, give technical advice and direction, and work independently
Master or PhD in Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Engineering, or related field
Proficient in English and you're also fluent in Dutch and/or French

The world is how we shape it. Let’s shape it together.

Job Description

Join our Data & AI team.

You will become part of a multidisciplinary team where data engineering, architecture, AI, analytics, governance and visualization come together. Together, we help clients get more value out of their data: from setting up the right data foundations to building dashboards, analytics solutions and AI use cases that support better decisions.

As an AI Engineer, you will contribute to this by designing, building and industrializing AI solutions that solve concrete business problems and can be used in real operational environments.

Title: AI Specialist
Description:
About Us

We are a well-established Belgian company in the insurance sector. Our flagship product is a SaaS platform used by insurance brokers, backed by over 20 years of success and a highly efficient, robust codebase built primarily in .NET.

We are currently in a strategic phase of innovation, integrating Artificial Intelligence to revolutionize how our users interact with our platform. To achieve this, we are building an ecosystem of Python microservices that communicate with our core system via APIs, and we are looking to expand our AI team to accelerate this journey.

The Role

You will join a growing Artificial Intelligence team, working closely with our AI Specialist. Your primary mission will be to design, develop, and deploy Generative AI solutions that deliver direct value to our users and optimize internal processes.

This is not just an R&D or experimental role; we have an ambitious roadmap to launch these new AI features into production. Our SaaS is used daily by thousands of professionals as their primary work tool. This means you will tackle real-world challenges related to high volume, scale, and performance, taking your code from development straight to the end-user.

You will have end-to-end ownership of your development lifecycle, supported by our Infrastructure and DevOps team.

What you will do in your day-to-day

Develop and implement AI-driven features, such as intelligent email analysis, automated data extraction from documents, conversational assistants, and complex RAG systems.
Build and maintain efficient, scalable microservices in Python using FastAPI.
Apply Prompt Engineering techniques, build RAG architectures, and integrate LLMs using frameworks like LangChain and LangGraph.
Design and implement robust LLM evaluation pipelines to ensure the quality, accuracy, and reliability of our generative models in production, leveraging observability tools like LangFuse.
Collaborate closely with the .NET development team to ensure seamless integration of AI services via APIs.
Engage with technical and business stakeholders to understand requirements and translate user needs into technical solutions.
Explore and evaluate new AI technologies, with the potential to dive into model fine-tuning and traditional Machine Learning in the future.
Manage the deployment and monitoring of your services in Azure, taking end-to-end responsibility with the backing of our infrastructure team.

What we are looking for

Demonstrable Mid-level experience in software engineering, with a strong focus on Python and API development (FastAPI).
Hands-on experience working with Large Language Models (LLMs), RAG architectures, and Prompt Engineering.
Familiarity with the Generative AI ecosystem and tooling; specifically, practical knowledge of frameworks like LangChain/LangGraph and monitoring/evaluation tools like LangFuse.
Experience working with cloud providers, preferably Azure (and familiarity with tools like Azure AI Foundry).
A strong "get things done" and product-oriented mentality. You are driven by shipping features to production, adding tangible value to customers, gathering real-world feedback, and iteratively improving the product.
An inquisitive, adaptable mindset with a strong capacity to learn and stay continuously up-to-date with the latest trends, tools, and breakthroughs in the rapidly evolving AI landscape.
Excellent communication skills to interact effectively with various stakeholders across the company.

Nice-to-haves

Knowledge or familiarity with .NET/C# to better understand the core of our platform.
Previous experience with fine-tuning open-source models or traditional Machine Learning.
Familiarity with LLM evaluation methodologies.

Title: Researcher
HTML:
The NATO PA is currently seeking 1 Researcher to support the policy team within the International Secretariat. 

  • This is a full-time on-site position based in Brussels, Belgium. 
  • Starting date is 1 September 2026. 
  • Eligibility is restricted to nationals of the 32 NATO member countries. 
  • The application deadline is 09 June at 23:59 (CEST).


JOB SUMMARY

Reporting to and under the supervision of the Director of the Committee on Democracy and Security (CDS), the Researcher – Democratic Resilience contributes to the implementation of the Assembly’s work on issues of democratic resilience by supporting the activities of the Committee and its Director and, in doing so, ensuring the cross-cutting integration of this issue into the Assembly’s work.

S/he contributes to the research and editorial content involved in drafting reports on democratic resilience and other policy documents of the CDS and assists by taking notes and drafting documents during committee meetings. S/he is also responsible for preparing preliminary research and literature reviews, as well as synthesizing relevant research, as needed.

S/he also supports the Director of the CDS in other aspects of the Assembly’s work on the theme of democratic resilience: the work of governing bodies and other committees, the preparation of seminars, as well as communication and outreach activities.

The Researcher may participate in the NATO PA’s Spring and Annual sessions as a full member of the NATO PA team, under the supervision and in support of the Director of the CDS Committee.


KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Under the supervision of the Director of the Committee on Democracy and Security, the Researcher:

  • Supports the work of the CDS on democratic resilience;
  • Contributes to research and drafting of Assembly reports;
  • Prepares documents such as background papers, speeches, and communication materials;
  • Assists during parliamentary sessions: note-taking and drafting summaries;
  • May be required to travel on committee visits in order to take notes, draft mission reports, and support communication activities.


ADDITIONAL RESPONSIBILITIES

At the request of the Secretary General and/or the Deputy Secretary General for Policy and Outreach, and under the supervision of the CDS Director, the Researcher:

  • Supports the implementation of the Assembly’s priorities and policies on the theme of democratic resilience;
  • Supports the preparation of an Annual Report on activities carried out in support of these priorities;
  • Occasionally performs administrative and support tasks for various departments;
  • Performs other tasks as needed by the Secretariat.


JOB PROFILE

Required qualifications and skills:

  • Master’s or doctoral degree in political science, international relations, journalism, or a related field;
  • Previous professional experience at a research institute, a government, or parliamentary body. Prior experience at an international organisation is considered a plus;
  • Excellent written English communication and drafting skills;
  • Strong interest in conducting research on a wide range of topics;
  • Good understanding of the areas of interest of the NATO PA and NATO and their respective mandates;
  • Good time management skills and flexibility;
  • Team player;
  • Flexibility to adapt to changing demands and willingness to travel;
  • Minimum language proficiency requirement in English: Level 5 (Advanced). Knowledge of another language, especially professional fluency in French, is an asset;
  • Candidates do not need to hold a current security clearance but should be willing to undergo a security clearance process, including the provision of a criminal record clearance upon request.


CONDITIONS

This position, generously funded by the Chamber of Deputies of the Grand Duchy of Luxembourg, offers a one-year temporary employment contract, with the possibility of a one-year extension subject to mutual agreement.


  • Monthly net salary of EUR 2,321.48;
  • Basic health insurance policy for the duration of the employment;
  • Possibility of working from home 2 days per week (from Belgium);
  • Monthly internet allowance for working from home;
  • Substantial reimbursement of commuting expenses;
  • Reimbursement of travel costs to and from Brussels at the beginning and end of the contract on a case-by-case basis, in compliance with the financial procedures of the Assembly.

More details about the employment conditions will be provided to the selected candidate upon receipt of an official offer from the Director of the Research Programme.


APPLICATION PROCESS


Materials required for applying:

  • A curriculum vitae, clearly indicating nationality and language proficiency;
  • A one-page (maximum) cover letter, explaining areas of interest, competence, availability; 
  • A writing sample of no more than five pages on a relevant topic (i.e., foreign policy, international relations, defence and security, etc.). Excerpts of longer pieces are acceptable. Sources and/or citations may be included in addition to the 5-page sample;
  • Two academic or professional references and their up-to-date contact details (contacts only, please avoid reference letters).


SUBMITTING YOUR APPLICATION

  • Please consult the NATO PA website for the application process

Title: Clinical Research Associate
Company: EORTC - European Organisation for Research and Treatment of Cancer
Description:
The Clinical Research Associate (CRA) works under the hierarchical supervision of: Head of Clinical Operations Department.

Objective

The CRA is responsible for site monitoring ensuring that clinical studies are conducted, recorded, and reported in accordance with the protocol, Good Clinical Practice (GCP), regulatory requirements, and EORTC’s expectations—with the ultimate goal of protecting patient safety and ensuring the integrity and quality of clinical trial data. The CRA serves as a key point of contact between the sponsor and investigational sites.

Main responsibilities / Major Activities

The CRA is responsible for site monitoring ensuring that clinical studies are conducted, recorded, and reported in accordance with the protocol, Good Clinical Practice (GCP), regulatory requirements, and EORTC’s expectations—with the ultimate goal of protecting patient safety and ensuring the integrity and quality of clinical trial data. The CRA serves as a key point of contact between the sponsor and investigational sites.

Main Responsibilities


Build strong, professional relationships with investigators and site staff, providing guidance and support to drive high performance
Serve as a key operational representative for assigned sites within the clinical project team, in line with the study clinical operations manager
Assess site compliance with ICH-GCP, protocol, regulatory requirements, and SOPs and implement an improvement plan with the site if needed
Oversee investigational product accountability and storage conditions
Ensure essential documents are maintained and complete in the Trial Master File and investigator site files
Identify, track, and resolve monitoring findings and protocol deviations
Ensures close collaboration between all actors of clinical trial research


Major activities


Conduct initiation, routine monitoring, “triggered” and close-out visits according to the monitoring plan and following the EORTC Standard Operating procedures (SOPs), GCP guidelines and applicable regulations
Verify source data, including complex oncology assessments (RECIST, lab results, imaging, adverse events, dosing)
Provide training and coaching on protocol requirements, oncology procedures, safety reporting, and EDC use.
Troubleshoot operational challenges to maintain recruitment and study timelines
Collaborate with data management, safety, and medical teams to support data reconciliation
Manage site quality issues according to EORTC’s procedure


Profile


Master’s degree in life sciences (biomedical sciences, pharmaceutical sciences…)
Minimum of 2 years’ experience as a CRA, ideally within oncology studies, combined with extensive GCP expertise.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills
Excellent organization skills, ability to work independently
Proactivity and dynamism
Flexibility in respect to work assignments and new learnings
Ability to travel up to maximum 40% of working time within Europe, primarily to Belgium, France and Spain depending on language proficiency.
Languages:
English (written & spoken) is mandatory
Knowledge of any of the following languages: Spanish, French

Title: HR & Office Coordinator – Brussels (Brussels)
Description:
Political Intelligence Brussels is seeking an proactive and organised HR & Office Coordinator to support both our people operations and the smooth running of our office. You will work closely with our HR Business Partner and Office Manager, playing a key role in ensuring an excellent employee experience and an efficient, well-functioning workplace.

Are you a hands-on, detail-oriented self-starter who enjoys variety in your day-to-day work? Do you thrive in a positive, team-focused environment and already have a first experience in a similar role? Then you might be the person we’re looking for!

With over 25 years of experience and a client portfolio made up of industry leaders, we are a leading consultancy on the Belgian market and a key player at EU level working at the heart of fast-moving policy debates that shape the digital landscape.

Main Responsibilities

HR Support


Support all stages of the recruitment process, including job postings, screening, and setting up interviews
Coordinate employee onboarding and offboarding
Contribute to HR projects (employee surveys, digitalisation of HR processes, HR metrics dashboards, AI-driven improvements)
Support performance and evaluation cycles, including follow-up on career development and training
Maintain and update HR databases, employee records, and HR policies
Assist in the development and implementation of the annual training plan


Office Management Support


Assist the Office Manager with administrative and operational tasks when needed (such as coordinating office supplies and relationships with service providers)
Liaise with IT service providers for office devices and phone subscriptions to ensure service quality and operational efficiency


The list and split of responsibilities is indicative and can evolve depending on priorities, deadlines, and the candidate’s development.

What We’re Looking For


At least 1 year of experience in a similar HR, administrative, or office coordination role
Strong organisational skills with attention to detail
A proactive, hands-on mindset and ability to manage multiple tasks
Interest in HR processes and employee experience
Good communication and interpersonal skills
Comfortable working with digital tools and openness to learning (including AI applications in HR)


What We Offer


Dynamic and collaborative work environment in a modern workspace
Permanent contract, full-time schedule (part-time can be discussed)
Opportunities for professional development and career growth.
Competitive benefits, including full medical coverage and extra vacation days
A strong company culture based on feedback and transparency.


How To Join Us

Did you recognise yourself in our description? If so, we look forward to receiving your CV with a short accompanying note on why you are the perfect fit (max 150 words) to job@political-intelligence.com with the reference “2603”. We value individuality, variety and diversity, so feel free to express yourself in your own voice.
